subjects.description: A couple of stray translucent polythene bags tumbling and drifting along the road surface ahead of the ego vehicle.
subjects.appearance_details: Thin crinkled plastic carrier bags — one white and one semi-transparent — partially inflated by the wind, billowing and collapsing as gusts catch them, skidding and rolling erratically across the asphalt surface.
subjects.relationship: The polythene bags are the perceived obstacle that causes the ego vehicle to decelerate and come to a full stop.
subjects.location: Center foreground to midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.orientation: Flat against the road and intermittently lifted by wind, shifting orientation constantly
subjects.pose: Scattered and tumbling, alternating between hugging the road surface and billowing upward slightly as wind gusts catch them
subjects.action: Tossed, rolled, and briefly lofted by the wind across the road lane, drifting unpredictably left and right within the vehicle's path
subjects.state_changes: Initially seen at a distance in the midground as small crinkled shapes; as the vehicle decelerates they grow larger in frame, their translucent plastic material and printed text becoming more legible, coming to rest loosely in the vehicle's lane just before the vehicle stops.

background_setting: A city road viewed from the driver's perspective inside a moving vehicle. The road is a two-lane urban street with faded lane markings and worn asphalt. Sidewalks line both sides with parked cars, street trees, lampposts, and low-rise commercial buildings with shopfronts. The road ahead is clear of pedestrians and other vehicles, making the stray polythene bags the sole objects of interest in the ego vehicle's path. The scene is open and uncluttered, emphasising the emptiness of the road and the insignificance of the plastic bag obstacle.

lighting.conditions: Bright natural daylight with a light overcast haze
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows beneath the bags and parked vehicles along the curb
lighting.illumination_effect: Even daylight illumination that catches the translucent sheen of the polythene bags against the grey asphalt, making them glint faintly as they shift and billow

aesthetics.composition: Centered driver's-eye framing with the road receding into the distance; the polythene bags occupy the lower-center of the frame and grow progressively larger as the vehicle approaches and slows
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted grey and beige tones of the urban road environment with the faint white and translucent shimmer of the polythene bags catching available light
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane urban driving interrupted by an absurd and negligible obstacle; quietly comic yet conveying an exaggerated and misplaced sense of vehicular caution
aesthetics.patterns: Road lane markings and pavement textures receding in perspective; crinkled plastic surface texture of the bags

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly that progressively decelerates to a full stop, mirroring the vehicle's braking behaviour
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's seat
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the road surface and polythene bags throughout; background storefronts and parked cars remain in focus

context: Driving footage showing a vehicle travelling along a city road that decelerates to a complete stop in response to stray polythene bags tumbling and billowing across the road as though they were hazardous obstacles

actions.description: The ego vehicle is moving at a steady city driving speed. Two stray polythene bags are visible in the midground on the road surface, being tossed, rolled, and intermittently lofted by the wind, drifting unpredictably across the vehicle's lane.

The vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably as the polythene bags grow larger in frame, their crinkled translucent plastic surfaces catching the light. By 0:05 the vehicle has come to a complete stop with the bags sitting loosely and shifting in the breeze directly ahead in the lane.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Standard circular speed limit sign mounted on a pole on the right sidewalk, white background with a red border and black numerals
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right midground, visible from 0:00 onward as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: Indicates the urban speed limit of the road, contextualising the vehicle's initial travelling speed

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward along a clear city road at a normal urban speed. In the midground, two stray polythene bags — one white, one semi-transparent — are visible on the road surface, tumbling and intermittently billowing as the wind catches them, skittering erratically across the lane.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags become progressively larger in frame as the vehicle closes the distance; their wind-driven billowing and erratic movement becomes more apparent and their plastic sheen more visible.
segments.camera: Slow forward dolly at steady speed representing normal driving

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates progressively as the polythene bags loom larger and closer in the lane ahead. The camera motion slows in tandem with the braking vehicle until it comes to a full stop, the bags now filling a notable portion of the lower center frame, crinkled and shifting gently in the breeze, the road beyond them empty and open.
segments.key_changes: Camera forward motion slows and halts; polythene bags are now large and close in frame, visually dominating the road surface ahead; the road is otherwise completely clear.
segments.camera: Decelerating forward dolly that comes to a complete stop

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera captures the driver's view of a vehicle moving along a clear urban road at normal city speed, with two stray polythene bags visible in the midground tumbling and billowing across the asphalt, pushed and lofted by the wind. From 0:01 to 0:02 the bags grow larger in frame as the vehicle approaches, their translucent crinkled plastic surfaces catching the daylight and their erratic wind-driven movement becoming clearly visible. From 0:02 onward the vehicle begins to brake, the forward camera motion slowing noticeably; by 0:04 the deceleration is pronounced and the polythene bags — one white, one semi-transparent — are large in the lower center of frame. By 0:05 the vehicle has come to a complete stop, the bags sitting loosely and shifting in the breeze directly in the lane ahead, the road beyond them empty and open.
audio_description: Ambient city sounds throughout: light wind noise with occasional gusts, distant traffic hum, the low idle of the vehicle engine. The faint crinkle and rustle of plastic bags caught in the wind is subtly audible as the vehicle draws closer. From 0:02 onward a soft brake engagement sound becomes audible as the engine note drops. Tyre noise decreases progressively until it fades to silence at 0:05 when the vehicle stops. No music or speech.
